title: Slash cloud carbon 24%—here’s how
meta_description: Cut cloud carbon 24% without slowing down — carbon-per-request budgets, Graviton3, Redis TTL consolidation, and AWS Batch Spot jobs with real metrics and code. For engineers who need to hit sustainability targets without breaking latency SLAs.
prewritten_tweet:
